summary.shape_sentence: Gap-up open at the highs, hard opening flush, reflex squeeze, then lower-high chop/fade into the close.

goat.note: Opening liquidation from the 25,220s into the 24,940 area was the largest expansion move of the session.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered near the open high and on afternoon lower highs, signaling repeated sell-the-rip behavior.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared strongest at the opening flush low and later 25,000-area retests, marking defended demand and rebound attempts.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply concentrated around 25,080-25,220, with afternoon rebounds capped most clearly in the 25,100-25,150 zone.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand was repeatedly defended around 24,940-25,000 and again near 25,000-25,030, preventing a full trend extension lower.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening flush was exhausting into a base near 24,950-25,000 and transitioning into a rebound.
time_markers.12pm_red: Late-morning squeeze had flattened into a sideways range around 25,100.
time_markers.2pm_green: Bounce attempt was active but still below prior highs, setting up another lower-high fade.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session closed near 25,039 after late chop, above the afternoon lows but well below the open.

takeaway: Bearish gap-up reversal day with an opening washout, strong reflex rebound, and then lower-high rotation under supply for most of the remaining RTH session.
